overview: jobbly.ai is a modern SaaS job search automation platform with a sleek glassmorphism design. It features AI-powered job routing, auto email generation, and Telegram channel scraping — all wrapped in a premium dark-themed UI.
features: Full-screen landing page with animated hero and scroll-reveal sections
Glassmorphism design system with deep black background and glass cards
Guided 5-step onboarding flow with progress bar and validation
Dashboard with real-time stats, connection status, and Telegram toggle
Email and Others data tables with expandable rows and pagination
Telegram integration page with connected/disconnected states
Profile management with completeness tracking and editable sections
Fixed left sidebar navigation for all authenticated pages
